case_title: KARL A. GILJUM, DC VS. VANN SOEUN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GILJUM, DC, KARL A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SOEUN, VANN THE MINOR CHILD FALLS WITHIN THE PROVISION OF FAMILY CODE SECTION 6922, SUCH THAT DEFENDANT IS NOT LIABLE FOR THE COST OF THIS MEDICAL CARE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,711.00 FILED BY GILJUM, DC, KARL A. AS TO DEFENDANT SOEUN, VANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-26-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK;S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-28-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SOEUN, VANN
